title: About the Business Register Update Survey | Stats NZ
content:
## About the Business Register Update Survey
21 September 2023, 10:45am
Information about taking part in the Business Register Update Survey, such as why we carry out the survey, how we selected you, and how to complete the questionnaire.
The purpose of this survey is to update our Business Register. Using a single centralised frame, or register, for all Stats NZ business and economic surveys allows us to integrate different surveys and data sources, and ensures that classifications and statistical unit definitions are applied consistently.

### What is the Business Register?
The Business Register is a comprehensive database of New Zealand businesses. It records details such as names and addresses, predominant type of industrial activity performed, institutional sector, employment levels, and the degree of overseas ownership. Its primary purpose is as a statistical register or frame for the various business surveys operated by Stats NZ.
We select approximately 14,000 of the around 600,000 medium-sized or large private and public sector businesses and organisations that produce goods and services in New Zealand and are registered with Inland Revenue.
The questions included in this survey are being asked under the Data and Statistics Act 2022.
Our approach to survey compliance has more information about your legal obligation to participate in the Business Register Update Survey.
The survey takes place annually. Large businesses are included every year, and medium-sized businesses are usually included every three years.

## How to complete the survey
Businesses with one operating location complete the questionnaire online. Find more information below about completing the survey online.
Businesses with multiple operating locations fill in a paper, or electronic (ePDF or Excel) questionnaire.
Most computers and browsers can be used to complete the survey online. The survey has been tested and optimised for the following internet browsers:
- Internet Explorer 10 and 11
- Firefox 47.0 and above
- Google Chrome v51.0.27 and above
- Safari 5.1.7 and above
The minimum security requirement is using an SSL enabled browser capable of 128 bit encryption.
- Information to complete your Business Register Update Survey questionnaire online Adobe Acrobat PDF file, 27 KB
